trigger: Pursuer path segment intersects target capture volume and optional closing-speed gate passes
purpose: Make flying through the target the true dominant objective
clamp_or_guardrail: Terminal reward only; do not award for side-by-side proximity
notes: Split from compatibility capture_reward; side passes do not terminate when require_flythrough_success is true.

purpose: Keep current good dense shaping so training remains fast
clamp_or_guardrail: Clip progress to avoid giant-step exploits
notes: This already seems to work well. Preserve it unless it conflicts with viewport mode.

trigger: When target is visible or locked or LOS reward gating is disabled
purpose: Reward lining up the velocity/path through the target instead of flying beside it
notes: Uses projected closest approach from current velocity ray to target.

trigger: When target is visible or locked and pursuer speed is meaningful
purpose: Penalize predicted path passing beside target
notes: Use projected closest approach, not raw final-step distance.

default_weight_or_formula: +5.0 when target_visible changes false to true for first time
purpose: Teach search behavior under limited camera FOV
notes: Meaningful but far below intercept reward.

purpose: Encourage keeping target in camera view

default_weight_or_formula: +2.5 when target_visible becomes true after being unseen
notes: Useful once target evasive motion is harder.

default_weight_or_formula: -0.08 per step when not visible and no lock
trigger: Target not visible and lock expired
purpose: Nudge the drone to search instead of ignore the camera
notes: Too high could punish exploration badly.

clamp_or_guardrail: Clamp to reasonable bounds such as [-2.0, 2.0]

trigger: Visible or locked target; optionally every step in privileged mode
purpose: Encourage moving toward the target/last-seen target
notes: In viewport mode, avoid rewarding based on perfect hidden target state.

trigger: Every step in privileged mode; visible/locked estimate in viewport mode
clamp_or_guardrail: Use last-seen estimate in viewport mode if target hidden
notes: Too much hidden-state distance shaping violates the viewport idea.
Can reduce if it makes fly-through too timid.
May conflict with search sweeping if too high.

trigger: Too close to floor or ceiling
